assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support window (vs. 14 months on Regular)' in the benefits section

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Additional charges apply only during the extended support period (months 15-24)' and mentions 'Cost is per-node-hour during extended support period'

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response states 'Extended gets the same versions as Regular at the same time initially' and 'The difference is Extended keeps versions longer past their normal EoS date'

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: While the response mentions that Extended doesn't delay access to new features, it doesn't warn about missing features or technical debt from staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to 'Check available versions in Extended channel' and states 'Since you're on GKE 1.31, you're eligible for Extended support (available for 1.27+)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: While the response mentions control and upgrade pressure, it doesn't specifically mention compliance requirements or slow internal change processes as use cases for Extended

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response states 'Extended delays automatic EoS upgrades until end of extended support' and mentions planning 'manual upgrades before end of extended support'

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Minor version upgrades are NOT automated on Extended (except at end of extended support)' and 'You must manually initiate minor upgrades'
